{"parts":[{"content":"**Summary:**

| Category | Before | After | Location |
|----------|--------|-------|----------|
| System | 7 | **41** | `SYSTEM_LEARNINGS.json` |
| Personal | 0 | **22** | `Personal/Knowledge/Learnings/` + N5 Brain |

**What happens now:**

1. **System learnings** — When Architect creates a new build, `pulse_learnings.py inject <slug>` can pre-seed relevant learnings into drop briefs. Drops won't repeat the same mistakes (JSON parsing, timeouts, etc.)

2. **Personal learnings** — When you ask me about ADHD, hiring, gamification, etc., `n5_load_context.py` will surface these via semantic memory. They're now part of your indexed knowledge.

The backfill is complete. Future builds will automatically harvest → triage → split into two review queues when you run the triage script again.
